creator: bmc@clapper.org
text:
On 05/31/2011 10:10 PM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of misc/gnuls,
>
> Please note that PR ports/157487 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/157487

Patch approved.
-- 
-Brian
